meta.title: SteelfullAI — Business Automation & Intelligent Systems
meta.description: I help businesses eliminate repetitive work, automate operations and improve customer response times through software, automation and intelligent systems. Work directly with Tim-Luka Stahl.
meta.keywords: business automation, AI automation, AI agents, process automation, custom software development, WhatsApp automation, automation for freelancers, self-employed, small businesses, Rio de Janeiro

hero.headline: Stop Losing Hours and Customers to Manual Work
hero.subheadline: I build automation and custom software that handle your repetitive tasks and customer inquiries — so nothing slips through and no one waits.

flow.caption: A single inquiry, handled end to end — without anyone touching a keyboard.

roi.label: Efficiency Calculator
roi.title: See What Repetitive Work Really Costs
roi.question: How many hours per week are lost to repetitive tasks?
roi.weeksValue: {count} weeks of full-time work each year
roi.disclaimer: Estimates based on typical automation recovering 70% of repetitive task time. Actual results are scoped during the audit.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: The Hidden Cost of Manual Work
problem.subtitle: Most inefficiency is invisible. It hides inside everyday tasks that feel normal — until you add up the hours.

items.title: A customer waits for a reply
items.desc: Messages arrive after hours and sit unanswered. By morning, the buying impulse — and sometimes the customer — is already gone.

items.title: An employee copies the same data
items.desc: The same information is retyped from inbox to spreadsheet to CRM. Hours disappear into work that creates nothing new.

items.title: A lead is quietly forgotten
items.desc: An inquiry slips between a chat app and a notebook. No one followed up, and no one noticed the revenue that walked away.

items.title: Systems that don't talk to each other
items.desc: Your tools each hold a piece of the truth, but none of them share it. People become the integration — manually, every day.

items.title: Bottlenecks that only one person can clear
items.desc: Work stalls because a single step depends on a single person. Growth makes the queue longer, not shorter.

transformation.label: The Shift
transformation.title: What Changes After Automation
transformation.subtitle: Same inquiry. Same systems. The difference is everything that used to happen in between.

impact.label: Business Impact
impact.title: Outcomes You Can Measure
impact.subtitle: Automation isn't the goal. These are.

items.title: Faster customer response
items.desc: Inquiries are acknowledged and routed instantly, day or night — so interest never cools while you sleep.

items.title: Less repetitive work
items.desc: The copy-paste tasks that drain your team's day are handled silently in the background.

items.title: More operational visibility
items.desc: Every inquiry, status and handoff is recorded — so you can see what's happening without asking around.

items.title: Reduced manual errors
items.desc: When data moves itself, it stops being retyped, mislabeled and lost between systems.

items.title: Operations that scale
items.desc: More volume no longer means more headcount. Your systems absorb the growth.

about.label: About
about.title: Work Directly With The Person Building The Solution
about.p1: I'm a software developer and business automation specialist. I work directly with each client to identify inefficiencies, automate repetitive work and build systems that improve operations.
about.p2: From the first strategy call to the live solution, there is no layer between us. You explain the problem to the person who designs and builds the answer.
about.closing: From strategy to implementation, you work directly with me.
about.credentials: Bachelor's degree, University of Applied Sciences Flensburg · Trained technical writer · Software developer & AI-automation engineer · Currently building CE-compliance software for a German engineering firm.

selectedWork.label: Selected Work
selectedWork.title: Real Projects, Already Shipped
selectedWork.subtitle: Not mock-ups — systems I have designed and built for a university, an engineering firm, and my own product.

items.name: University of Applied Sciences Flensburg
items.title: Standardized module handbooks across every degree program
items.desc: Module handbooks were scattered across dozens of degree programs, each with its own layout, styling and terminology, maintained by hand. I built a web application where every professor edits in one shared place — so the final handbooks come out consistent in layout, terminology and structure, in German and English for international students. Faster to produce, with no manual post-editing.

items.name: Ingenieurbüro Leimkühler GmbH
items.title: Software that generates CE machine-safety documentation
items.desc: An engineering office specializing in CE conformity for machine safety under European standards. I work as their developer, DevOps and AI-automation engineer, building the software that produces their compliance documentation — pairing my background as a trained technical writer with AI agents that draft, structure and check the paperwork machine certification demands.

items.name: educAItion
items.title: A shipped AI product for education
items.desc: My own product: a desktop application for education with a built-in document editor (Word/PDF export), homework and class management, and an AI agent that works across OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and local models. Live, in active testing, with regular releases — end-to-end proof of what I build: design, software, AI and shipping.

process.label: Process
process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: A clear path from "this is slowing us down" to "this runs itself."

steps.title: Audit
steps.desc: We map how work actually flows today — the tools, the handoffs and the hours quietly leaking out of your operation.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.desc: I prioritize the automations with the highest return and lowest risk, then turn them into a concrete, sequenced plan.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.desc: I design and build the solution, connect it to your existing systems and test it against real-world cases — directly with you.

steps.title: Optimization
steps.desc: Once it's live, we measure, refine and expand — turning the first win into a system that keeps compounding.

useCases.label: In Practice
useCases.title: What This Looks Like In Your Business
useCases.subtitle: Different industries, the same pattern: less manual work, faster response, fewer things falling through the cracks.

items.scenario: Patients message at all hours to book, reschedule and ask about availability — and the front desk can't keep up.
items.outcome: Booking and reminders run automatically and sync to the calendar, cutting no-shows and freeing staff for patients in the room.

items.scenario: Prospective students inquire across WhatsApp, Instagram and email, and follow-up depends on whoever happens to see it.
items.outcome: Every inquiry is captured, answered instantly and tracked to enrollment — so no interested student is ever forgotten.

items.scenario: Leads arrive from portals and ads, but qualifying and routing them to the right agent takes hours the lead won't wait.
items.outcome: Leads are qualified, matched and assigned the moment they arrive, with every detail logged straight into the CRM.

items.scenario: Intake means repetitive forms, document collection and status updates that pull senior people into administrative work.
items.outcome: Intake and document workflows run themselves, keeping clients informed automatically while the firm focuses on casework.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Questions, Answered
faq.subtitle: Straight answers to what businesses ask before we start.

items.a: There's no fixed price tag, because the right solution depends on what we're automating. So here's how it works: we start with a free audit, and before any work begins you get a clear, fixed quote — no surprises, no obligation. Most automations pay for themselves in recovered time within months, and we start with the one that returns the most, fastest.
Focused automations often go live in a few weeks, while broader system integrations take longer. After the audit you'll have a realistic timeline before any work begins.

items.q: Can it work with my current software?
items.a: In most cases, yes. I build around the tools you already use — CRM, spreadsheets, calendars, messaging — rather than forcing you to replace them. Connecting disconnected systems is a core part of the work.
None at all. You bring the deep knowledge of your business; I handle every technical decision and explain things in plain language as we go.
Yes. I work with clients remotely across time zones and deliver in Portuguese, English and German. For clients in Rio de Janeiro, I also offer in-person support.

items.q: Do small businesses and individuals benefit?
items.a: Especially small businesses. When the team is lean, every hour reclaimed from repetitive work has an outsized impact — automation lets you operate like a much larger company. That applies to freelancers and self-employed professionals too — I don't work only with companies.

finalCta.label: Get Started
finalCta.title: Discover Where Your Business Is Losing Time
finalCta.text: In a short conversation I will identify practical opportunities to automate processes and improve efficiency — with no obligation to continue.

contact.label: Send a Message
contact.title: Tell Me What's Slowing You Down
contact.subtitle: One line is enough. I read every message myself and reply within 24 hours — no obligation.
contact.name: Your name
contact.message: What would you like to automate or improve?
contact.success: Thanks — your message reached me. I'll reply within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again, or reach me on WhatsApp.

services.audit: Not sure yet — I'd like an audit

contact.meetingLabel: How would you like to talk?
contact.meetingInPerson: In person in Rio de Janeiro

chat.title: Ask me anything
chat.subtitle: Built by Tim — an AI assistant like the ones I build for clients.
chat.greeting: Hi — I'm Tim (well, my AI, trained to answer just like I would). Tell me about your business and what's eating your time, and I'll show you where automation can help.
chat.disclaimer: Tim's AI assistant. For the specifics, the real Tim replies personally.
chat.error: Sorry, I couldn't respond just now. Please try again or message Tim on WhatsApp.
chat.handoffPrompt: Leave your email and I'll send this conversation to Tim — he replies within 24 hours.
chat.handoffSent: Done — Tim has your conversation and will reply within 24 hours.
chat.handoffError: Couldn't send just now. Please try WhatsApp or the form on the page.
